title: A held-out-herb target-prioritization benchmark with prespecified leakage controls and compound-profile similarity diagnostics

creators.name: Hu, Chenyu
creators.affiliation: School of Intelligent Medicine and Information Engineering, Jiangxi University of Chinese Medicine

creators.name: Zhang, Xinyou
creators.affiliation: School of Intelligent Medicine and Information Engineering, Jiangxi University of Chinese Medicine

description: Open reproducibility release containing a fixed public herb-target test set, frozen graph inputs, selected checkpoints, complete score matrices, and independent evaluation code. The archive-level license is Other (Open); project code remains MIT-licensed, while source-derived data, checkpoints, score matrices, and results remain governed by the source-specific terms documented in DATA_LICENSE.md.
